description:
List of beneficiaries of community charity consisting of about 125 names, mostly craftsmen, laborers, and foreigners (from Palestine and Syria).  Each name is separated by a dot. Individuals include Hassan b. Kushik, Sa‘id al-‘Aqrabani, a lacemaker (al-‘aqqada) and a pastry chef (qaṭāʾifī). There are also two Karaites: Abū l-ʿAlāʾ and Ibrahīm al-Ghazzī b. Hārūn. Ca. 1050-1070 CE.

(S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society 1:438, 447; 2:411; 3:428) EMS
description_he: רשימת כ-125 מקבלי צדקה, בעיקר אומנים ועובדים וזרים, כולל שני קראים, כ-1050-1070
